bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use ImageBundle for the panel art and overlay bitmap text or signed-distance-field text for floor and time values.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/ui_floor_timer_strip_240x48.png through AssetServer and anchor it to the top-center HUD layout.
runtime_notes: Panel supports one line for FLOOR XX / 30 and one line for MM:SS.ss.
Keep the art narrow enough that it does not compete with the tower skyline near the top center.
Text margins should assume frequent live timer updates without clipping.

context.usage: Top-center HUD plate for current floor index and elapsed time during puzzle solving and speed-rank play.

shape.silhouette: Slim art-deco HUD plate with a large title row and a smaller timer row beneath it.

acceptance_criteria: Panel supports a two-row text layout with enough margin for FLOOR 30 / 30 and MM:SS.ss.
The frame remains readable over bright doorway glow and dark skyline silhouettes alike.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds puzzle rules, object dimensions, HUD placement, and the Bevy 0.14 technical targets for Umbra Scale.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the twilight art-deco tower mood, silhouette layering, amber beam contrast, and architectural ornament rhythm.

reference_images.label: umbra_character
reference_images.purpose: Grounds Umbra silhouette proportions, eye-glow placement, and cloak-like shadow contours for player and echo scale checks.
